hero.title: Redefining Lab Automation
hero.description: Modular hardware · Intelligent scheduling · AI-driven. OSDL hardware paired with OpenSDL software and the Xyzen agent platform — build your autonomous laboratory.

about.title: One Ecosystem, Three Layers
about.description: OSDL modular hardware handles execution. OpenSDL local software handles scheduling. Xyzen cloud agents handle decisions. Three layers working seamlessly — transforming your lab from manual to autonomous.

chat.subtitle: Cloud Intelligence
chat.title: Xyzen Agent Economy
chat.description: A platform where AI agents specialize, collaborate, and trade. Your agents work for you — designing experiments, analyzing data, orchestrating hardware. Publish to the marketplace and earn around the clock.

discover.name: Specialized Agents
discover.description: Each agent masters one domain — synthesis, characterization, data analysis. With persistent memory and skills that sharpen over time.

connect.name: Agent Economy
connect.description: Publish your agents to the marketplace. When others call them, you earn automatically. A frictionless micro-economy.

accelerate.name: Hardware Integration
accelerate.description: Xyzen agents control OSDL hardware directly through OpenSDL. Cloud decisions to local execution — fully automated.

server.subtitle: Local Scheduling
server.title: OpenSDL — Your Lab Operating System
server.description: A lightweight scheduling engine running locally. Connects OSDL hardware, receives Xyzen commands, orchestrates experiment workflows. Plug and play, works offline.

robotics.name: Plug & Play
robotics.description: OSDL hardware is auto-detected on connection. Zero configuration. As simple as plugging in a USB device.

ai.name: Real-time Scheduling
ai.description: Millisecond-level response. Precise control over every device action, timing, and parameter.

data.name: Data Capture
data.description: Automatically records complete data from every experiment. Structured, traceable, reproducible.

digital-twin.name: Offline Operation
digital-twin.description: Core scheduling runs entirely local. Network outages don't stop experiments. Auto-syncs when connectivity returns.

remote.name: Remote Monitoring
remote.description: Monitor experiment status through Xyzen from anywhere. Your lab in your pocket.

modular.name: Open Interface
modular.description: Standardized APIs and SDKs. Third-party hardware integrates into the ecosystem effortlessly.

osdl.name: OSDL
osdl.description: Modular lab hardware series. Syringe pumps, liquid handlers, XYZ stages — snap together, build what you need.

opensdl.name: OpenSDL
opensdl.description: Local scheduling software. Connects hardware, orchestrates experiments, real-time control. Your lab OS.

xyzen.name: Xyzen
xyzen.description: Cloud AI agent platform. Agents design experiments, analyze data, control hardware, and generate revenue for you.

hero.tagline3: Every Step Recorded — Every Experiment Reproducible

products.label: Hardware
products.title: Modular. Flexible. Reproducible.
products.description: Every module captures complete process data. Snap together what you need — every experiment is fully reproducible.
products.note: All modules are plug-and-play with OpenSDL

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.title: Open Source + AI
ecosystem.opensdl_description: Local scheduling engine. Connects hardware modules, orchestrates experiments, captures every data point. Flexible, modular, and runs offline.
ecosystem.xyzen_description: Cloud agent platform. AI designs experiments, controls hardware through OpenSDL, and monitors everything in real-time. Desktop, mobile, everywhere.
